title: SNC Music
description: A mod for music lovers in Minecraft:)
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e09be2e00a2bd445b705724d783127e577fb968.png)

![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a887b6f1178acdf4ccbe7b54a77e44c882f1a830.png)

**SNCMusic** is amod that allows you to play song in minecraft realtime. **SNCMusic Mod** is a client side mod with interesting features.

![installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2950729851e1c40701a6284b685257ffc6652f6f.png)

1. To import Song/Music You must have that in .waw format.
2. Install the mod (as always).
3. Open the mod ui by pressing P.
4. Click on Open Music folder and an folder will be opened.

![custom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0609acc8e2bfcf4b1d89622a8aaa977d33a2b55f_0.webp)


*. Import your music in .waw format and reopen ur gui.
Now You can play your custom music!

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/700060335b0fa72c303a637a24aa5b1f4bb73136_0.webp)

Also Added Multiplayer features in which now you can play your music and other can also listen it, If players have also this mod of same version ! (Newer versions)

### **Dependencies**

[FABRIC API ](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
